narrative:
04 court of appeals district has 378,467 registered voters, with 56.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.4 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -8.1% D−R vs -16.4% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
